reporting.title: Reporting
reporting.description: Platform-wide usage analytics: session volume over time, top workspaces, and capacity.
reporting.liveOnlyNotice: Reporting is live-backend only. Run with

auditLog.title: Audit Log
auditLog.description: Immutable record of administrative and security-relevant actions across the organization.
auditLog.liveOnlyNotice: The audit log is live-backend only. Run with
auditLog.filterPlaceholder: Filter by action (e.g. session, apikey, vmprovider)…
auditLog.backendNotConnectedDescription: Run with NEXT_PUBLIC_API_MODE=live to view the audit log.

metrics.title: Metrics
metrics.description: Time-series of platform metrics sampled from agents and the control plane.
metrics.liveOnlyNotice: Metrics are live-backend only. Run with
metrics.noSamples: No samples for this metric in the selected range.

logForwarding.title: Log Forwarding
logForwarding.description: Stream session and audit events to your SIEM via Fluent Bit — syslog, Splunk HEC, Elasticsearch, Loki, or generic HTTP.
logForwarding.liveOnlyNotice: Log forwarding is live-backend only. Run with
logForwarding.createdToastDescription: Disabled by default — enable after verifying.
